channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists discover a strange property in rice and turn it into a smart material
item.description: Scientists discovered that rice behaves in a highly unusual way: it weakens under rapid compression but stays stronger when pressure is applied slowly...

item.title: Scientists built a battery-free device that turns sunlight into fuel
item.description: Scientists have developed an artificial photosynthesis system that essentially regulates itself, eliminating the need for batteries used in many current...

item.title: The 1,100-year-old mystery of Montana’s lost bison hunting site finally solved
item.description: For nearly 700 years, Indigenous hunters used a bison kill site in central Montana, then abruptly stopped, despite bison remaining abundant.

item.title: NASA reveals Artemis III crew for one of the most complex space missions ever
item.description: NASA has selected the Artemis III crew for a high-stakes 2027 mission to test the future of lunar exploration. Astronauts will launch aboard...
